arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE: Arsenal make Sesko decision, Rashford suffers Man Utd blow, fresh Garnacho twist
arts.sum: Arsenal are ready to splash out on RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko while there's been a change in Napoli's attempts to sign Alejandro Garnacho from Manchester United, who want to bring in Patrick Dorgu

arts.ttl: Man Utd beaten to Garnacho replacement by IPSWICH
arts.sum: Kieran McKenna, Ipswich’s manager and a previous coach at Man Utd, appears to have been crucial in the decision, with the 38-year-old manager having repeatedly called Enciso in an attempt to make his sign for Ipswich until the end of the season. Manchester United ’s miserable period goes on, with Ipswich Town now beating them to sign Julio Enciso from Brighton, a player Ruben Amorim’s side had lined up to replace the outgoing Alejandro Garnacho .
